task: Write a JavaScript function that takes an array of objects and groups them by a specified property key.
Write a JavaScript function that debounces another function by a given delay in milliseconds.
Write a JavaScript function that deeply flattens a nested array into a single-level array.
Write a JavaScript function that takes two date strings and returns the number of days between them.
Write a JavaScript function that truncates a string to a maximum length and appends an ellipsis if it was cut.
